response.overview: Mikhail Demetrov, a promising young lawyer, is preparing for his wedding to his boss's daughter. But everything is canceled when he meets Diana, his first love. Diana is a gypsy, but Mikhail, it turns out, is also a gypsy. As teenagers, they, a gypsy Romeo and Juliet, fell in love against their families' wishes and decided to escape the camp together. But Diana was forced into marriage, and Mikhail was banished forever. He did everything he could to forget his beloved and his home. The hero must discover that he has a daughter, Yana, and that only he can save her. To do this, he will have to give up everything he has achieved. He will have to return to the camp—to his "friends" who hate him. And to strangers who want him dead. He will have to learn how and why his father was killed many years ago and how it is connected to Diana's father... Love and blood are together again in Mikhail's home on Shakespeare Street.
response.title: Улица Шекспира
